model_loading_errors.name: Missing recommendation model
model_loading_errors.message: Missing required model file: backend/models/artifacts/recommendation_model.pkl. Place the provided .pkl model here or set ANNADATA_MODEL_DIR.

model_loading_errors.name: Missing prediction model
model_loading_errors.message: Missing required model file: backend/models/artifacts/prediction_model.pkl. Place the provided .pkl model here or set ANNADATA_MODEL_DIR.

prediction_errors.name: Unsupported recommendation interface
prediction_errors.message: recommendation_model.pkl must expose recommend(), predict_proba(), or predict().

prediction_errors.name: Unsupported prediction interface
prediction_errors.message: prediction_model.pkl must expose predict_market() or predict().

prediction_errors.name: Malformed prediction output
prediction_errors.message: Prediction model output must include price, yield, and risk.
